title: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS610-8P-2S+IN
description: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS610-8P-2S+IN is a manageable, 8-port Gigabit PoE Switch with two SFP+ slots (backwards compatible with SFP modules as well), without a fan and a kit for attaching to a 19" rack. The Switch has a 140W PoE budget for powering up to 8 devices using 802.3af/at standards with a maximum load of 30 W/port It also includes a specially designed operating system Switch OS (SwOS) for fast switching and a wide range of settings. SwOS can therefore be fully set up from your web browser. This gives you all the basic functions for a controllable switch, plus more: It allows you to manage port-to-port forwarding, MAC address filtering, VLAN configuration, mirror traffic, traffic restrictions and even MAC and IP header settings Device Power cord Ears to 19" rack
